modelUnavailable: Sorry, my brain is a bit foggy right now 🤯 Engineers are on it, just a moment!
Oops, my thinking cap fell off 😅 Don't worry, I'll be back soon! Take a short break~
My apologies! I'm a bit slow right now 🦞💤 The system is working on it, please try again shortly
My brain is recharging ⚡ Give me a few minutes, I'll be back at full power!
agentDown: I just took a quick nap 😴 Waking up now, please wait a moment...
I'm feeling a bit under the weather 🤒 Engineers are helping me recover, almost there!
I'm rebooting 🔄 Please wait about 30 seconds, I'll be right back!
networkError: Signal seems a bit weak 📡 I'm trying to reconnect, please hold on~
The network sneezed 🤧 I'm reconnecting, try sending again in a moment?
noCredits: You've run out of energy ⚡ Top up and we can keep chatting!
Energy is low 😢 Upgrade your plan or add energy to continue?
rateLimited: You're typing too fast 😆 Let me catch my breath, try again shortly~
Slow down, slow down 🦞 Even lobsters need to breathe! Wait a few seconds~
modelSwitched: Just switched to a backup brain to think 🧠 Here's the answer!
I used my backup brain to help 🤔 Here's what I got~
reconnected: I'm back! Got disconnected for a moment, all good now 🦞✨
Reconnected! Where were we? Let's continue 😊
Network is back! I'm still here, what would you like to chat about?

rateLimit.tooManyRequests: Too many requests, please try again later

chat.backupModelNotice: _[Temporarily using a backup model, your primary model will recover shortly]_
